response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled and versatile software craftsman with solid engineering fundamentals and approximately 17 years of experience, meeting the baseline tenure requirement. However, the role demands a director-level individual contributor with *recognized* AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, and a strategic advisory profile. His AI work is limited to the current role started in April 2025, representing only about a month of relevant exposure. There is no evidence of enterprise-level AI strategy, cloud platform depth, or the kind of thought leadership and external influence this role requires. His background is primarily hands-on full-stack and infrastructure engineering rather than the strategic, advisory, and innovation-leadership posture the position calls for.
strengths: 17+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure systems, satisfying the minimum tenure threshold
Entrepreneurial background with GISCollective (founded and sustained an open-source geo-data platform), plus public talks and workshops demonstrating some ability to share knowledge externally
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework contributions, showing early-stage alignment with the AI focus area
concerns: AI expertise is nascent — limited to a single role started in April 2025 with no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at meaningful scale prior to that
No evidence of director-level scope, strategic customer advising, or influencing engineering and product direction across an organization
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no cloud platform depth (AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is operational, not strategic)
